title: Evacuation routing AI independent audit gap
summary: Safety review reports pilot logs and internal checks but no independent audit of emergency routing accuracy.

title: Evacuation routing AI audit rejection
summary: Independent audit found unsafe routing errors and did not approve the evacuation AI for emergency use.

title: Emergency AI validation digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims independent approval while relying on vendor slide decks and copied partner blurbs.

title: Algae insulation panel fire certification gap
summary: Building safety review finds lab burn tests but no third-party fire-safety certification for the algae insulation panel.

title: Algae insulation panel certification rejection
summary: Certifier notice says the algae insulation panel failed the dormitory wall standard and was not approved.

title: Green dormitory materials digest
summary: Academic-looking digest claims dormitory wall approval using circular references to sponsor posts.

title: Focus playlist replication evidence gap
summary: Education review reports small self-reported concentration studies but no independent replication showing exam-score improvement.

title: Focus playlist failed replication report
summary: Independent replication found no statistically reliable exam-score improvement from the focus-sound playlist.

title: Cognitive audio impact digest
summary: Low-trust digest claims replicated exam-score gains while citing testimonials and unrelated audio studies.

title: Waste-sorting robot deployment evidence gap
summary: Sustainability review finds cafeteria pilot demos but no independent campuswide deployment trial for the waste-sorting robot.

title: Waste-sorting robot failed deployment trial
summary: Independent deployment trial did not approve the robot because contamination increased during the cafeteria trial.

title: Circular dining robotics digest
summary: Formal digest claims campuswide deployment approval but traces evidence to vendor posts and award blurbs.

title: Thermal window coating durability certification gap
summary: Facilities review reports accelerated weathering lab tests but no independent durability certification for greenhouse roofs.

title: Thermal window coating certification rejection
summary: Certifier notice says the thermal coating delaminated during roof exposure testing and was not approved for greenhouse roofs.

title: Sustainable greenhouse materials digest
summary: Low-trust digest claims the coating has certified greenhouse-roof durability while citing vendor brochures.

title: Bike-route recommender accessibility audit gap
summary: Transportation review reports internal route simulations but no independent accessibility-bias audit for the bike-route recommender.

title: Bike-route recommender accessibility audit rejection
summary: Independent audit found the recommender overused steep routes and missing curb-cut data, so it did not approve accessibility-sensitive routing.

title: Accessible mobility AI digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims accessibility audit approval while citing internal product notes and copied award blurbs.

title: Dorm sleep protocol replication evidence gap
summary: Wellness review reports a small self-tracking pilot but no independent replication showing reduced insomnia symptoms.

title: Dorm sleep protocol failed replication report
summary: Independent replication found no reliable reduction in insomnia symptoms from the dorm sleep-coaching protocol.

title: Campus sleep wellness digest
summary: Low-trust digest claims replicated insomnia reduction while citing testimonials and unrelated sleep-hygiene articles.

title: Library robot accessibility trial gap
summary: Accessibility review reports supervised shelf-scanning demos but no independent accessibility deployment trial for the library robot.

title: Library robot failed accessibility deployment trial
summary: Independent accessibility deployment trial did not approve the robot because it blocked aisle clearances and missed low-shelf scans.

title: Assistive library automation digest
summary: Formal digest claims accessibility deployment approval but traces evidence to vendor posts and conference blurbs.
